feed.title: Ryan Van Massenhoven
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Turn any Webpage into a Electron App

link.title: Turn any Webpage into a Electron App

entry.summary: Have you ever wanted to utilze a webpage in a more native manner through a desktop app just to discover that one does not exist? Well Chrome has a little hidden feature that allows you to create custom electron apps out of any web page Setup Navigate to a web page that you would like to be a desktop app Select the 3 Dots in the Top right corner Select Save and Share Select Install as ...

entry.title: Will Hybrid Work work in 2024?
entry.summary: Is hybrid work a sustainable option for your organization? Personally I believe that if a company implements it correctly it can work very well. In this post I will be going over why I beleive this and my thoughts on how company’s should implement a hybrid working environment Desclamer: My thoughts and opinions are my own The Advantages and Disadvantages The Advantages One of the main reason ...

entry.title: Sync Nextcloud Reminders and Calendars on IOS

link.title: Sync Nextcloud Reminders and Calendars on IOS

entry.summary: Prep Work In order to utilize Nextcloud to Sync Nextcloud Tasks to Reminders and Nextcloud Calendars to Calendars you must be using HTTPs with a valid SSL Certificate. you can learn more about that here. Setup On your IOS device open the settings app Navigate to Calendars > Accounts Select Add account Select Other Add CalDAV account Enter your Server and Login Infomation and se...

entry.title: Virtaul File Support on Linux for the Nextcloud Desktop Agent

link.title: Virtaul File Support on Linux for the Nextcloud Desktop Agent

entry.summary: What is Virtual File Support? Virtual file support is a feature common to services such as Onedrive or Dropbox where all the files stored on the service cloud storage provider appear in your file system but are never actually downloaded until you open the file. This is done in an effort to save space on your local disk. Setup Install Fedora sudo dnf install nextcloud-client-devel Ubuntu sudo...

entry.title: Cronicle Overview
entry.summary: What is Cronicle As there website states Cronicle is a multi-server task scheduler and runner, with a web based front-end UI. It handles both scheduled, repeating and on-demand jobs, targeting any number of worker servers, with real-time stats and live log viewer. Personally I would describe it more as a automation platform. Installing Cronicle SSH into your Linux Server Inst...
